ContentDesc_Des Händlers Liebesmüh (fort: The dutiful mammet Memolivia listens to your every word with what you can only guess is rapt attention, speedily writing down the details in incomprehensible shorthand. It then begins trimming the text further until naught remains but concise descriptions of the fiercest battles you encountered in The Merchant's Tale. As you read the record over, you find that without the trappings of that wondrous story to soften them, the foes you faced were terrifying beyond your wildest imaginings...
